anti_hammering_wear_boundary.reason: probe is intentionally single-shot and does not provision or loop TPM NV writes

mount_refusal_logs.reason: hardware TPM epoch did not commit on this run; replay test would not measure a provisioned epoch

pcr_drift.reason: PCR read failed or anchor path has no persistent PCR policy; PCR-bound freshness remains a non-claim

reboot_recovery.reason: hardware TPM epoch did not commit on this run; replay test would not measure a provisioned epoch

stale_snapshot_replay.reason: hardware TPM epoch did not commit on this run; replay test would not measure a provisioned epoch

next_code_edit: If TPM access is enabled, run a provisioned stale-snapshot replay and reboot/remount refusal proof; otherwise keep rollback resistance as a non-claim.
scope: Bounded hardware TPM epoch-freshness probe.  It records whether the production hardware anchor path commits an epoch or is blocked by local TPM/provisioning/permission state.  It is not a rollback resistance claim.
